title: pnpm + TS/ESM monorepo + static-site + CI skeleton
context: Cold-start toolchain for ewing-survivorship-late-effects, an open, education-only Ewing sarcoma survivorship/late-effects resource library. This is agent-neutral infrastructure only (no patient-facing content), establishing the build on which the safety/licensing CI gates and all later content depend. It must keep the toolchain vendor-neutral and collect no PII / no analytics-by-default per the project's no-data-collection stance.
objective: Scaffold a pnpm + TypeScript/ESM monorepo with a static-site package and a green CI skeleton that later safety/licensing and quality gates plug into.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspace with TypeScript/ESM packages builds cleanly (pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass)
Static-site package scaffolded for publishing plain-language survivorship pages (no content shipped yet)
CI workflow runs build/test/lint on every PR and is green on an empty fixture, with hooks where the safety/licensing and quality gates (003/004) will attach
No PII collection, no third-party analytics, and no agent/vendor-specific logic in the core toolchain
output: Repo scaffold: package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, tsconfig, packages/site static-site, and .github/workflows/ci.yml
